title: cosmia quadrivalvis
side_effects: Cosmia quadrivalvis can have side effects if used improperly, such as severe allergic reactions, nausea, and stomach ulcers in some individuals. Overconsumption of the plant's extract can also lead to tremors, seizures, and even temporary loss of vision. Moreover, people with pre-existing kidney or liver conditions may experience exacerbated symptoms, including liver failure and kidney damage, if they ingest the plant's toxic compounds. In extreme cases, improper use of Cosmia quadrivalvis can result in respiratory failure and even death.
